name: TUSQ Ludwieg tube — UNSW Config A (aeroelastic ramp) conditions
description: Freestream conditions for the Bhattrai et al. cantilevered compression-ramp experiment (research plan Config A). Replaces the generic Mach 6 / 25 km atmosphere baseline when targeting this anchor.
source: Bhattrai, McQuellin, Currao, Neely, Buttsworth, J. Propulsion and Power 38(1), 2022. doi:10.2514/1.B38348; UNSW High-Speed FSI Database Case 05-2020
status: Values transcribed from the research plan summary of the paper. Re-verify against the paper PDF before publication-grade comparisons.
geometry_notes: Pair with mesh.config_a_ramp_area_law() for the calibrated effective-area law (its default lengths are placeholders — set L_ramp / L_isolator / H_capture from the paper drawings). Ramp: leading-edge incidence 8.33 deg, total turning 18.51 deg, 3 mm Al 6061-T6 cantilever.
